ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, testing, rehabilitation) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the session (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, patient, trainer, researcher) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Injury history of the user */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the metric is derived from */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., average speed, maximum angle) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was calculated */,
  "comparative_value" REAL /* Comparative value for the metric (e.g., previous session's value) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the data is associated with */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of external device (e.g., heart rate monitor, GPS) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., heart rate, speed) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to collect the data */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., athlete, trainer, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view data, edit data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the note is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., comment, observation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_notes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the report is associated with */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, injury assessment) */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the file is associated with */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., video, image) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., mp4, jpg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., heart rate monitor, GPS) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_sessions" (
  "device_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device session */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the device usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the device usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new session, new comment) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
